creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Closed with the commit of ports/144495. 

Just so you know, the patch was incomplete because distinfo was missing. As maintainer you should be aware that the purpose of the distinfo file is to record the hashes and size of the distribution files at the time that you prepared the update for the port. This ensures that if the files are modified at the source that we do not process them as they may contain harmful code. In the future please include distinfo updates with your patches.
